input: Dear Hiring Team,
output: Prezada equipe de recrutamento,

input: I am writing to apply for the Code for Good Hackathon organized by JPMorgan Chase & Co.
output: Escrevo para candidatar-me ao Hackathon Code for Good, organizado pela JPMorgan Chase & Co.

input: I am currently a Computer Engineering student at Vishwakarma Institute of Technology, Pune, and I am very interested in using technology to solve real-world problems that can make a positive impact.
output: Atualmente sou estudante de Engenharia da Computação no Vishwakarma Institute of Technology, em Pune, e tenho grande interesse em usar a tecnologia para resolver problemas reais que possam gerar um impacto positivo.

input: Through my projects, I have gained hands-on experience in building practical and meaningful solutions.
output: Por meio dos meus projetos, adquiri experiência prática na construção de soluções úteis e significativas.

input: For example, I developed an AI-based SQL assistant that helps users write database queries more efficiently, and a drawing tool that uses AI to simplify image editing.
output: Por exemplo, desenvolvi um assistente de SQL baseado em IA que auxilia os usuários a escrever consultas de banco de dados de forma mais eficiente, e uma ferramenta de desenho que utiliza IA para simplificar a edição de imagens.

input: I have also worked on a blockchain-based system for transparent budget tracking and built a virtual CPU simulator to strengthen my understanding of core system concepts.
output: Também trabalhei em um sistema baseado em blockchain para rastreamento transparente de orçamentos e criei um simulador de CPU virtual para aprofundar minha compreensão dos conceitos fundamentais de sistemas.

input: These experiences have helped me become comfortable with both backend development and problem-solving at a deeper level.
output: Essas experiências permitiram-me sentir-me à vontade tanto com o desenvolvimento backend quanto com a resolução de problemas em um nível mais profundo.

input: I have actively participated in hackathons, where I learned how to work in fast-paced environments, collaborate with teams, and quickly turn ideas into working solutions.
output: Participei ativamente de hackathons, onde aprendi a trabalhar em ambientes dinâmicos, a colaborar com equipes e a transformar rapidamente ideias em soluções funcionais.

input: Winning Best UI Design at the Inspiron Hackathon and receiving a Best Paper Award at IEEE OTCON were great learning experiences that motivated me to keep improving.
output: Vencer o prêmio de Melhor Design de UI no Inspiron Hackathon e receber o prêmio de Melhor Artigo no IEEE OTCON foram experiências de aprendizado valiosas que me motivaram a continuar aprimorando-me.

input: What excites me most about Code for Good is the opportunity to work on challenges that have a real social impact.
output: O que mais me entusiasma no Code for Good é a oportunidade de trabalhar em desafios que tenham um impacto social real.

input: I enjoy working in teams, sharing ideas, and building solutions that are not only technically strong but also useful for people.
output: Gosto de trabalhar em equipe, compartilhar ideias e desenvolver soluções que não são apenas tecnicamente robustas, mas também úteis para as pessoas.

input: I believe my technical background, along with my ability to adapt and work under pressure, will allow me to contribute effectively during the hackathon.
output: Acredito que minha formação técnica, juntamente com minha capacidade de adaptação e de trabalhar sob pressão, me permitirá contribuir efetivamente durante o hackathon.

input: Thank you for considering my application.
output: Agradeço por considerar minha candidatura.

input: I would be grateful for the opportunity to participate and learn through this experience.
output: Ficarei agradecido pela oportunidade de participar e aprender com esta experiência.

input:
Sincerely,
Rajwardhan Mali
output: Atenciosamente, Rajwardhan Mali

input: Dear Hiring Team,
output: Sehr geehrtes Einstellungsteam,

input: I am writing to apply for the Code for Good Hackathon organized by JPMorgan Chase & Co.
output: Ich schreibe, um mich für den Code for Good Hackathon zu bewerben, der von JPMorgan Chase & Co. organisiert wird.

input: I am currently a Computer Engineering student at Vishwakarma Institute of Technology, Pune, and I am very interested in using technology to solve real-world problems that can make a positive impact.
output: Derzeit studiere ich Computer Engineering am Vishwakarma Institute of Technology in Pune und interessiere mich sehr dafür, Technologie zur Lösung realer Probleme einzusetzen, die einen positiven Einfluss haben können.

input: Through my projects, I have gained hands-on experience in building practical and meaningful solutions.
output: Durch meine Projekte habe ich praktische Erfahrung im Aufbau praxisnaher und bedeutungsvoller Lösungen gesammelt.

input: For example, I developed an AI-based SQL assistant that helps users write database queries more efficiently, and a drawing tool that uses AI to simplify image editing.
output: Zum Beispiel habe ich einen KI‑basierten SQL‑Assistenten entwickelt, der Nutzern hilft, Datenbankabfragen effizienter zu schreiben, und ein Zeichenwerkzeug, das KI nutzt, um die Bildbearbeitung zu vereinfachen.

input: I have also worked on a blockchain-based system for transparent budget tracking and built a virtual CPU simulator to strengthen my understanding of core system concepts.
output: Ich habe zudem an einem blockchain‑basierten System zur transparenten Budgetverfolgung gearbeitet und einen virtuellen CPU‑Simulator erstellt, um mein Verständnis der grundlegenden Systemkonzepte zu vertiefen.

input: These experiences have helped me become comfortable with both backend development and problem-solving at a deeper level.
output: Diese Erfahrungen haben mir ermöglicht, mich sowohl mit der Backend‑Entwicklung als auch mit der tiefergehenden Problemlösung vertraut zu machen.

input: I have actively participated in hackathons, where I learned how to work in fast-paced environments, collaborate with teams, and quickly turn ideas into working solutions.
output: Ich habe aktiv an Hackathons teilgenommen, wo ich gelernt habe, in schnelllebigen Umgebungen zu arbeiten, im Team zu kooperieren und Ideen rasch in funktionierende Lösungen umzusetzen.

input: Winning Best UI Design at the Inspiron Hackathon and receiving a Best Paper Award at IEEE OTCON were great learning experiences that motivated me to keep improving.
output: Der Gewinn des Preises für das beste UI‑Design beim Inspiron Hackathon und der Erhalt des Best‑Paper‑Awards bei IEEE OTCON waren wertvolle Lernerfahrungen, die mich motivierten, mich weiter zu verbessern.

input: What excites me most about Code for Good is the opportunity to work on challenges that have a real social impact.
output: Am meisten begeistert mich an Code for Good die Möglichkeit, an Herausforderungen zu arbeiten, die eine reale gesellschaftliche Wirkung haben.

input: I enjoy working in teams, sharing ideas, and building solutions that are not only technically strong but also useful for people.
output: Ich arbeite gern im Team, teile Ideen und entwickle Lösungen, die nicht nur technisch stark, sondern auch für Menschen nützlich sind.

input: I believe my technical background, along with my ability to adapt and work under pressure, will allow me to contribute effectively during the hackathon.
output: Ich bin überzeugt, dass mein technischer Hintergrund sowie meine Fähigkeit, mich anzupassen und unter Druck zu arbeiten, es mir ermöglichen wird, während des Hackathons effektiv beizutragen.

input: Thank you for considering my application.
output: Vielen Dank, dass Sie meine Bewerbung in Betracht ziehen.

input: I would be grateful for the opportunity to participate and learn through this experience.
output: Ich wäre dankbar für die Möglichkeit, teilzunehmen und durch diese Erfahrung zu lernen.

input:
Sincerely,
Rajwardhan Mali
output: Mit freundlichen Grüßen, Rajwardhan Mali

input: Dear Hiring Team,
output: Madame, Monsieur, l'équipe de recrutement,

input: I am writing to apply for the Code for Good Hackathon organized by JPMorgan Chase & Co.
output: Je vous écris pour postuler au Hackathon Code for Good organisé par JPMorgan Chase & Co.

input: I am currently a Computer Engineering student at Vishwakarma Institute of Technology, Pune, and I am very interested in using technology to solve real-world problems that can make a positive impact.
output: Je suis actuellement étudiant en génie informatique à Vishwakarma Institute of Technology, Pune, et je suis très intéressé par l’utilisation de la technologie pour résoudre des problèmes concrets susceptibles d’avoir un impact positif.

input: Through my projects, I have gained hands-on experience in building practical and meaningful solutions.
output: Grâce à mes projets, j’ai acquis une expérience pratique dans la conception de solutions concrètes et significatives.

input: For example, I developed an AI-based SQL assistant that helps users write database queries more efficiently, and a drawing tool that uses AI to simplify image editing.
output: Par exemple, j’ai développé un assistant SQL basé sur l’IA qui aide les utilisateurs à rédiger des requêtes de bases de données plus efficacement, ainsi qu’un outil de dessin utilisant l’IA pour simplifier la retouche d’images.

input: I have also worked on a blockchain-based system for transparent budget tracking and built a virtual CPU simulator to strengthen my understanding of core system concepts.
output: J’ai également travaillé sur un système basé sur la blockchain pour le suivi transparent des budgets et créé un simulateur de CPU virtuel afin de renforcer ma compréhension des concepts fondamentaux du système.

input: These experiences have helped me become comfortable with both backend development and problem-solving at a deeper level.
output: Ces expériences m’ont permis de me sentir à l’aise tant dans le développement back‑end que dans la résolution de problèmes à un niveau plus approfondi.

input: I have actively participated in hackathons, where I learned how to work in fast-paced environments, collaborate with teams, and quickly turn ideas into working solutions.
output: J’ai participé activement à des hackathons, où j’ai appris à travailler dans des environnements rapides, à collaborer avec des équipes, et à transformer rapidement des idées en solutions fonctionnelles.

input: Winning Best UI Design at the Inspiron Hackathon and receiving a Best Paper Award at IEEE OTCON were great learning experiences that motivated me to keep improving.
output: Remporter le prix du meilleur design UI lors du Hackathon Inspiron et recevoir le prix du meilleur article à l’IEEE OTCON ont été d’excellentes expériences d’apprentissage qui m’ont motivé à continuer de progresser.

input: What excites me most about Code for Good is the opportunity to work on challenges that have a real social impact.
output: Ce qui me passionne le plus dans Code for Good, est l’opportunité de travailler sur des défis ayant un véritable impact social.

input: I enjoy working in teams, sharing ideas, and building solutions that are not only technically strong but also useful for people.
output: J’apprécie travailler en équipe, partager des idées et concevoir des solutions qui ne sont pas seulement techniquement solides, mais aussi utiles aux personnes.

input: I believe my technical background, along with my ability to adapt and work under pressure, will allow me to contribute effectively during the hackathon.
output: Je crois que mon parcours technique, ainsi que ma capacité à m’adapter et à travailler sous pression, me permettront de contribuer efficacement pendant le hackathon.

input: Thank you for considering my application.
output: Je vous remercie d’avoir examiné ma candidature.

input: I would be grateful for the opportunity to participate and learn through this experience.
output: Je serais reconnaissant de l’opportunité de participer et d’apprendre à travers cette expérience.

input:
Sincerely,
Rajwardhan Mali
output: Cordialement, Rajwardhan Mali

output: J’ai participé activement à des hackathons, où j’ai appris à travailler dans des environnements rapides, à collaborer avec des équipes, et à transformer rapidement des idées en solutions fonctionnelles.

input: Winning Best UI Design at the Inspiron Hackathon and receiving a Best Paper Award at IEEE OTCON were great learning experiences that motivated me to keep improving.

input:
